expr: (async () => { const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.ready; return 'sw ready: ' + !!reg.active; })()

(() => ({ offlinePage: document.querySelector('h1') ? document.querySelector('h1').textContent : 'NO PAGE', formCards: document.querySelectorAll('.card').length, itemRow: !!document.querySelector('.item-row') }))()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#amount','1000'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); return { h1: document.querySelector('h1').textContent, total: document.querySelector('#r-total').textContent }; })()
